box_guarantees._source: pokemoncard.co.kr Korean official card list + FullAhead Japanese secret/TR supplement (#91-94, #107-115). Japanese Sun & Moon expansion community box model: RR 3-4, TR 1-2, and SR-or-higher 1-2 per box. High-slot weights follow the observed secret-card composition: SR Pokemon 9, SR Trainer 3, HR Pokemon 6, UR 3. Korean official pull rates are unpublished.
